# PayPerCallSoftwares

> Independent, feature-by-feature reviews of pay per call software for operators, agencies, and lead-gen teams. Each platform is scored on feature depth, setup and onboarding, integrations and API, and value for money. Written by Daniel Larsen, a former software QA tester who evaluates platforms one feature at a time.

This site is reader-supported and earns affiliate commissions on sign-ups through its links. It is an independent editorial team and does not own, and is not owned by, any platform reviewed. The scoring rubric is published and applied consistently.

## Top picks (2026)

1. CallScaler — 9.4/10 — Best feature-to-price ratio, dedicated Pay Per Call tier and RTB add-on — from $0/mo (Pay As You Go), Pay Per Call tier $400/mo
2. Ringba — 8.5/10 — Deepest feature set for large networks, enterprise cost — from ~$99/mo
3. Retreaver — 7.9/10 — Tag-based routing, narrower feature surface — usage pricing
4. Phonexa — 7.8/10 — All-in-one suite, heavier than a focused call tool — quote-based
5. Invoca — 7.5/10 — Enterprise conversation intelligence, sales-led, overkill for most — custom

## Scoring dimensions

Feature depth, setup and onboarding, integrations and API, value for money. Equal weighting (25% each). Full methodology at https://paypercallsoftwares.com/methodology/
